title: Kujawinski Lab cleaning protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4tqsf","text":"This protocol describes lab cleaning procedure for glass and plastics.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"cirtn","text":"Safety googles, gloves, and lab coat","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2n2hg","text":"Acid bath with 10% hydrochloric acid","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2r78l","text":"Citranox detergent: diluted solution to ~1% detergent in water ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dcmm5","text":"Autoclave - for final step with polycarbonate bottles","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6ervp","text":"Combustion oven - for final step with glassware","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add a small amount of diluted Citranox to hot water in tub (less than 5 mL into ~2 gallons of water).
Add dishes to the tub making sure every surface is covered with water. Containers with chunky bits should be scrubbed with a brush to remove all evidence of particulate material.
Rinse thoroughly with hot tap water.
After rinsing, place containers into acid bath and let sit Overnight .
Cover open tops and exposed surfaces with aluminum foil.
creator: Krista Longnecker
